text: 100 days of code is a lot of fun I know that In today's video we will learn about tuple The list we read was very useful We saw many methods of tuple And we also saw What we can do with this list There is another data type in python Which is tuple And it is equally useful Because you can't change tuple And it has some important methods Which I am going to tell you about Let's go to the computer screen And let's get started The way we saw about list Tuple is also very similar But the difference is You can't change tuple And what I will do to make tuple I will do something like this I will write tuple And I will use these brackets And I will write values 1, 5, 6 If I print type I will say type of tuple And if I print tuple I will get these values 3 values And I will get last tuple If there were 2 elements Like this I would get 1 and 5 What about if there was only 1 element Then there will be a confusion And see Class int Now you will say I made tuple Of 1 element So this is the biggest confusion of python developers If you are making tuple of 1 element Then comma is necessary Otherwise python will get confused That you are writing 1 value In brackets Or you are making a new tuple Python will get confused So you have to write 1 comma Run it like this So class tuple is made Of 1 element Tuples are ordered collection of data items They store multiple items in a single variable Tuple items are separated by commas And enclosed within round brackets Tuples are unchangeable Means you cannot change tuples If there was a list Then I could have done something like this That Tuple 0 is equal to 90 And then the 0th value of tuple would have changed But here you see Type error Tuple object does not support item assignment If I would have added more values And run it like this Then you see Same error is coming But how about if this was a list I have written tuple But this is a list Type of tuple Will show a list So the first value of this has changed So I can change in list Now you will say Why should I use tuple I can change everything No, it does not work like this What happens is Sometimes you will want to intentionally Like you want to make a constant Kind of a constant list Which you want to change by mistake And you are working on a very complex program So you will want That no one should change it by mistake So you will use tuple Now here I have given an example I have printed both Tuple has the same thing If I give a value Like a string Then the string will also come here So you can see here It is printing like this I hope you are understanding And the rest Almost everything is the same Except the fact that you cannot change it You can put some other values Of other data type That will also work But you can't change it Here Now if I Print tup0 Let's say I print tup0 And after this I print tup1, tup2 I print tup34 If I print 34 then there will be an error Because 34 does not exist So see tuple index is out of range But the program will run up to here And you will see 1, 2, 76 Which is present on 0, 1st and 2nd I hope you understood So this way we can Index tuple Positive indexing and negative indexing Are same in tuple Like we talked about list So if someone Wrote tuple-1 Then you will not process minus 1 You will see the length 3, 2, 5, 5-1, 4 So tuple is 4 0, 1, 2, 3, 4 So it is 32 In fact I printed the length wrong I am sorry Let's print it Print the length Double click L-E-N Let's print the length Length is 7, so 7-1 is 6 So 0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6 So it is true print So we can resolve negative indexing Like we saw In list Now you can check If 342 In tuple Yes 342 Is present In this tuple So you can do like this Now run it And your work will be done So 342 is present in this tuple You got it printed If I print 3421 Then it will not be printed It will be evaluated in false So like this item can be checked If it is present or not Similarly like we talked about slicing In list We can talk about slicing here also Slicing can be done But you will say slicing can be done But tuple is not like that After slicing a new tuple is written So tuple does not change A new tuple is made Like if I write here Tube2 is equal to tube So I will write here from 1 to 4 So a new tuple will be made So if I print tube2 So a new tuple will be made And it will be returned Which will start from 2 and will run till 342 0, 1, 2, 3 This is minus 1 index So 2, 76 and 342 It will be exactly like we talked about Slicing of list Similarly we can do tuple slicing Similarly Like we printed list We can do it It is very similar We can convert negative indexes into positive indexes Whenever you get to see something like this So where there is blank You can put 0 If there is blank here then you can put length of this tuple Like I told you in list If someone writes something like this Tube0 to blank So instead of blank You can write length of tuple If someone writes like this This to 4 or this to 3 Like this So you can put 0 here If there is blank here then you can put length of this tuple I hope this is clear It is exactly like we did in list So I hope you understood I want you to try all the methods Try all the methods Try to revision list With the help of tuple How you will do it Do slicing, it will be revisioned As it is in list, it is in tuple Then use in keyword The difference is You can't change tuple You can't change its value You can't change its length Once you have made tuple then you will make new tuple Or you can't change existing tuple Tuples are immutable Strings are immutable Lists
